evidence: "If you liked Father Dowling on TV, you will love the DVD's."
"This is a great way to study American History!"
"What a great team. Loved the story lines, the actors, the scenes and everything about this series."
"What fun we have had playing these!"
"This DVD came earlier than promised. It was new, sealed, everything as promised."
"There has never been a remake of a collection done to the perfection of this one."

"It is a treasure to own and view."
"What fun we have had playing these!"

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented and drama genres, favoring simple narratives with a slow pacing. They have a high sensitivity to production quality and appreciate emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
